about.subtitle: // who am I
about.title: About Me
about.p1: Full-stack developer in a Software Engineering Master's, specialized in building end-to-end applications — from backend architecture to production deployment.
about.p2: Passionate about machine learning applied to real problems: signal detection in NASA data, time series prediction, data pipelines. I use AI as an execution lever, not a crutch.
